overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a cobblestone path from a riverside dock through a medieval village toward a fortified castle gate. The scene is bathed in warm golden hour sunlight with clear skies, featuring detailed historic architecture and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside dock path with moored boat

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the cobblestone waterfront path away from the dock

entered.detail: wooden sailboat with tan canvas sails moored at the river dock
wooden pier structure extending into the calm water
burning fire pit enclosed by wooden log frame
tall medieval stone towers with red conical roofs visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a riverside dock area in golden hour light. Geralt walks along a cobblestone path beside the water, passing a moored sailboat and burning braziers. The fortified castle towers loom in the distance ahead while trees line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with timber and thatched houses

agents.ego_description: continuing through the village outskirts past wooden houses and stone walls

entered.detail: traditional wooden house with steep thatched straw roof
low stone boundary wall running alongside the path
simple wooden post and rail fence

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the village, the waterfront gives way to traditional timber houses with thatched roofs. The path remains cobblestone, flanked by wooden fences and stone walls. The castle towers grow larger in the center of the frame as the character progresses toward the fortified town.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified castle gate approach with guards

events.description: guards in red armor become visible standing watch near the castle entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the large stone gate, passing guards stationed near the entrance

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing watch near the gate entrance

entered.detail: massive fortified stone archway with metal portcullis and defensive crenellations
small wooden shelter structure for the gate guards
small rustic wooden building with thatched roof near the gate

segments.scene_description: The final approach to the castle brings the character to a large fortified stone gate. Guards in red armor stand watch on the left as the path narrows. The stone walls rise on both sides, framing the imposing archway entrance that dominates the center of the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene riverside dock through a medieval village toward the imposing entrance of a fortified castle. It begins with Geralt walking along a cobblestone path beside the water, passing a moored sailboat and burning braziers under the warm glow of the golden hour. As the character progresses, the waterfront scenery gives way to a residential area of traditional timber houses with thatched roofs and wooden fences, while the distant castle towers gradually grow larger in the center of the frame. The scene then shifts toward the final approach, where the path narrows between rising stone walls and guards in red armor. Finally, the camera arrives at the massive fortified stone gate, with the imposing archway entrance dominating the view.
